description: Look up board games, expansions, hot rankings, user collections, and logged plays from BoardGameGeek's official XMLAPI2 — search, full game detail with stats and rankings, and the live hot list, all without a browser.

novel_features.name: Full-Text Game Search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across locally synced games, expansions, and accessories
novel_features.rationale: Requires a domain SQLite index over synced thing rows; the XMLAPI2 search is name-prefix only, so offline full-text lookup is something the raw API cannot do

novel_features.name: Local Analytics
novel_features.description: Aggregate queries (group-by, counts, averages) over locally synced BoardGameGeek data
novel_features.rationale: Only possible with a local SQLite store populated from the API; BGG exposes no aggregate endpoints

novel_features.name: Compound Workflows
novel_features.description: Chain multiple API operations (search then thing-detail then collection) in one invocation
novel_features.rationale: Combines several boardgamegeek.com/xmlapi2 calls behind one agent-friendly command

auth_description: Register an application at https://boardgamegeek.com/applications (Non-commercial licenses are free), wait for approval, then create a token under your application and send it as Authorization: Bearer <token>.
